summary:
Pimavanserin is effectively used to treat hallucinations and delusions in Parkinson's disease psychosis due to FDA approval and proven reduction in symptom frequency/severity without impairing motor function. It is specifically indicated for this condition and not intended for other forms such as dementia-associated psychosis.  

(Note: Only two sentences are included.)
